TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == knbaqan knblayan qba na Tayal 泰雅族的手工藝 == garing cyunga mutuw pmiyan Tayal qa nutuw naha 'alan kho hiya ga, gmlux cqa qqyanux naha mmuya rruma tayal qa 'alan naha ttmuyax . babaw nya mwah qa Gipun lga, alan sklokah na Gipun maha klokah mmuya qa tlakas ro blhuy, ro alun na Gipun s'alan naha ptbes kya cinqlangan na Gipun maha . garing kya qa lokah muya kya qabax qa qalang na Tayal qani. pucing na Gipun lga, yaqa nuka na kgis cqa bblhuy qa piyang besun na Kahat, qabax nutu snkwan kho na Tayal hya ga, wayan suqun mbes na kmukan qabax,ana balung yaba na qqhoniq rgyax tayal ga wayan nha squn tmakuy ru kmut qabax, ru masoq sholuy ru msqap rrgyax la, ru mnkux qa mrhow pklahang, garing kya hayi 45 kawas lga srhongun nya kmayan cinqlangan na Tayal naha, klokah muya qali ro gmlux thoki musa muya qali, nanu qabax qalang lga si psulung muya qali ro ruma naha, baha hmcwa wayan kmayan kahat mha bbesun myan qabax ma, tehok 60 kawas lga wan si thotaw qa hhriqan bbesan, garing kya uka mwah mbes pinnuya qali ru ruma ki tlakas la. garing kya lga mwah mkura te heci hmkangi yaw ro kruma ga si kaki kya hlahuy muya tqenux papak stake,ini cinnwaya maki kya heci lru mbinah mwah qalang muya kaki ru qenam ki nasi, ana ga ini qbsyaq uyi, ini kpiyux nalan naha lru, tgaring kya muya rramat la ro si sta mwani. nanu qa yaw na rmurux tcinun na tayal hiya ga, garing cqa 2000 kawas trang qa mqutih ciyan qnqyanux na ita Taywan memaw mgiyaw ptyawun qabax ccquliq, baha hmcwa baq lmnglun sexu pklahang, garin kya rmurux yaw na salan mangay na llpyung, garing kya rmurux ywaw na tminun, ana lmamu cninun na tokan, takil ru lukus ratan qbubu, ini ga llukus pala tiyu na kknerin, ana tnaring na qba wakil ru tara ga pktalan nha lpyung, kruma lga tgaring pcqrux salan m'abi na llpyung, nway akya mwah tmwang nnalan rmanga qutux muyax.
S.PHON: == knβaqan knβlajan qβa na tajal ******* == ɣariŋ ʦ~ʨjuŋa mutuw pmijan tajal qa nutuw naħa ʔalan kħo ħija ɣa, ɣmlux ʦ~ʨqa qqjanux naħa mmuja rruma tajal qa ʔalan naħa ttmujax . βaβaw nja mwaħ qa ɣipun lɣa, alan s~ɕklokaħ na ɣipun maħa klokaħ mmuja qa tlakas~ɕ ro βlħuj, ro alun na ɣipun s~ɕʔalan naħa ptβes~ɕ kja ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan na ɣipun maħa . ɣariŋ kja qa lokaħ muja kja qaβax qa qalaŋ na tajal qani. puʦ~ʨiŋ na ɣipun lɣa, jaqa nuka na kɣis~ɕ ʦ~ʨqa ββlħuj qa pijaŋ βes~ɕun na kaħat, qaβax nutu s~ɕnkwan kħo na tajal ħja ɣa, wajan s~ɕuqun mβes~ɕ na kmukan qaβax,ana βaluŋ jaβa na qqħoniq rɣjax tajal ɣa wajan nħa s~ɕqun tmakuj ru kmut qaβax, ru mas~ɕoq s~ɕħoluj ru ms~ɕqap rrɣjax la, ru mnkux qa mrħow pklaħaŋ, ɣariŋ kja ħaji ** kawas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕrħoŋun nja kmajan ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan na tajal naħa, klokaħ muja qali ro ɣmlux tħoki mus~ɕa muja qali, nanu qaβax qalaŋ lɣa s~ɕi ps~ɕuluŋ muja qali ro ruma naħa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa wajan kmajan kaħat mħa ββes~ɕun mjan qaβax ma, teħok ** kawas~ɕ lɣa wan s~ɕi tħotaw qa ħħriqan ββes~ɕan, ɣariŋ kja uka mwaħ mβes~ɕ pinnuja qali ru ruma ki tlakas~ɕ la. ɣariŋ kja lɣa mwaħ mkura te ħeʦ~ʨi ħmkaŋi jaw ro kruma ɣa s~ɕi kaki kja ħlaħuj muja tqenux papak s~ɕtake,ini ʦ~ʨinnwaja maki kja ħeʦ~ʨi lru mβinaħ mwaħ qalaŋ muja kaki ru qenam ki nas~ɕi, ana ɣa ini qβs~ɕjaq uji, ini kpijux nalan naħa lru, tɣariŋ kja muja rramat la ro s~ɕi s~ɕta mwani. nanu qa jaw na rmurux tʦ~ʨinun na tajal ħija ɣa, ɣariŋ ʦ~ʨqa **** kawas~ɕ traŋ qa mqutiħ ʦ~ʨijan qnqjanux na ita tajwan memaw mɣijaw ptjawun qaβax ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa βaq lmŋlun s~ɕexu pklaħaŋ, ɣarin kja rmurux jaw na s~ɕalan maŋaj na llpjuŋ, ɣariŋ kja rmurux jwaw na tminun, ana lmamu ʦ~ʨninun na tokan, takil ru lukus~ɕ ratan qβuβu, ini ɣa llukus~ɕ pala tiju na kknerin, ana tnariŋ na qβa wakil ru tara ɣa pktalan nħa lpjuŋ, kruma lɣa tɣariŋ pʦ~ʨqrux s~ɕalan mʔaβi na llpjuŋ, nwaj akja mwaħ tmwaŋ nnalan rmaŋa qutux mujax.
S.FORM: == knbaqan knblayan qba na Tayal 泰雅族的手工藝 == garing cyunga mutuw pmiyan Tayal qa nutuw naha 'alan kho hiya ga, gmlux cqa qqyanux naha mmuya rruma tayal qa 'alan naha ttmuyax . babaw nya mwah qa Gipun lga, alan sklokah na Gipun maha klokah mmuya qa tlakas ro blhuy, ro alun na Gipun s'alan naha ptbes kya cinqlangan na Gipun maha . garing kya qa lokah muya kya qabax qa qalang na Tayal qani. pucing na Gipun lga, yaqa nuka na kgis cqa bblhuy qa piyang besun na Kahat, qabax nutu snkwan kho na Tayal hya ga, wayan suqun mbes na kmukan qabax,ana balung yaba na qqhoniq rgyax tayal ga wayan nha squn tmakuy ru kmut qabax, ru masoq sholuy ru msqap rrgyax la, ru mnkux qa mrhow pklahang, garing kya hayi 45 kawas lga srhongun nya kmayan cinqlangan na Tayal naha, klokah muya qali ro gmlux thoki musa muya qali, nanu qabax qalang lga si psulung muya qali ro ruma naha, baha hmcwa wayan kmayan kahat mha bbesun myan qabax ma, tehok 60 kawas lga wan si thotaw qa hhriqan bbesan, garing kya uka mwah mbes pinnuya qali ru ruma ki tlakas la. garing kya lga mwah mkura te heci hmkangi yaw ro kruma ga si kaki kya hlahuy muya tqenux papak stake,ini cinnwaya maki kya heci lru mbinah mwah qalang muya kaki ru qenam ki nasi, ana ga ini qbsyaq uyi, ini kpiyux nalan naha lru, tgaring kya muya rramat la ro si sta mwani. nanu qa yaw na rmurux tcinun na tayal hiya ga, garing cqa 2000 kawas trang qa mqutih ciyan qnqyanux na ita Taywan memaw mgiyaw ptyawun qabax ccquliq, baha hmcwa baq lmnglun sexu pklahang, garin kya rmurux yaw na salan mangay na llpyung, garing kya rmurux ywaw na tminun, ana lmamu cninun na tokan, takil ru lukus ratan qbubu, ini ga llukus pala tiyu na kknerin, ana tnaring na qba wakil ru tara ga pktalan nha lpyung, kruma lga tgaring pcqrux salan m'abi na llpyung, nway akya mwah tmwang nnalan rmanga qutux muyax.
S.PHON: == knβaqan knβlajan qβa na tajal ******* == ɣariŋ ʦ~ʨjuŋa mutuw pmijan tajal qa nutuw naħa ʔalan kħo ħija ɣa, ɣmlux ʦ~ʨqa qqjanux naħa mmuja rruma tajal qa ʔalan naħa ttmujax . βaβaw nja mwaħ qa ɣipun lɣa, alan s~ɕklokaħ na ɣipun maħa klokaħ mmuja qa tlakas~ɕ ro βlħuj, ro alun na ɣipun s~ɕʔalan naħa ptβes~ɕ kja ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan na ɣipun maħa . ɣariŋ kja qa lokaħ muja kja qaβax qa qalaŋ na tajal qani. puʦ~ʨiŋ na ɣipun lɣa, jaqa nuka na kɣis~ɕ ʦ~ʨqa ββlħuj qa pijaŋ βes~ɕun na kaħat, qaβax nutu s~ɕnkwan kħo na tajal ħja ɣa, wajan s~ɕuqun mβes~ɕ na kmukan qaβax,ana βaluŋ jaβa na qqħoniq rɣjax tajal ɣa wajan nħa s~ɕqun tmakuj ru kmut qaβax, ru mas~ɕoq s~ɕħoluj ru ms~ɕqap rrɣjax la, ru mnkux qa mrħow pklaħaŋ, ɣariŋ kja ħaji ** kawas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕrħoŋun nja kmajan ʦ~ʨinqlaŋan na tajal naħa, klokaħ muja qali ro ɣmlux tħoki mus~ɕa muja qali, nanu qaβax qalaŋ lɣa s~ɕi ps~ɕuluŋ muja qali ro ruma naħa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa wajan kmajan kaħat mħa ββes~ɕun mjan qaβax ma, teħok ** kawas~ɕ lɣa wan s~ɕi tħotaw qa ħħriqan ββes~ɕan, ɣariŋ kja uka mwaħ mβes~ɕ pinnuja qali ru ruma ki tlakas~ɕ la. ɣariŋ kja lɣa mwaħ mkura te ħeʦ~ʨi ħmkaŋi jaw ro kruma ɣa s~ɕi kaki kja ħlaħuj muja tqenux papak s~ɕtake,ini ʦ~ʨinnwaja maki kja ħeʦ~ʨi lru mβinaħ mwaħ qalaŋ muja kaki ru qenam ki nas~ɕi, ana ɣa ini qβs~ɕjaq uji, ini kpijux nalan naħa lru, tɣariŋ kja muja rramat la ro s~ɕi s~ɕta mwani. nanu qa jaw na rmurux tʦ~ʨinun na tajal ħija ɣa, ɣariŋ ʦ~ʨqa **** kawas~ɕ traŋ qa mqutiħ ʦ~ʨijan qnqjanux na ita tajwan memaw mɣijaw ptjawun qaβax ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa βaq lmŋlun s~ɕexu pklaħaŋ, ɣarin kja rmurux jaw na s~ɕalan maŋaj na llpjuŋ, ɣariŋ kja rmurux jwaw na tminun, ana lmamu ʦ~ʨninun na tokan, takil ru lukus~ɕ ratan qβuβu, ini ɣa llukus~ɕ pala tiju na kknerin, ana tnariŋ na qβa wakil ru tara ɣa pktalan nħa lpjuŋ, kruma lɣa tɣariŋ pʦ~ʨqrux s~ɕalan mʔaβi na llpjuŋ, nwaj akja mwaħ tmwaŋ nnalan rmaŋa qutux mujax.
